channel.title: Life Reflections on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Life Reflections on yexca'Blog

item.title: Curating My Music, Preserving My Vibes
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash

My blog started getting super dry and dull after I began posting more specialized learning content. Seriously, opening it just screamed ‘study time,’ which built up this mental block against writing. I’ve wanted to post other stuff for ages but never got around to it. Well, thanks to some recent events, I’m gonna give a non-tech post a shot.

「まだ雨はやまない」

On 2025-03-23, I grabbed my first physical album: Shigure Ui’s ‘まだ雨はやまない’. The album art, like a photo album, is just too cute!
